menu.title: Neon wave runner

inventory.loadoutHint: Arrow changes the player shape. Trail changes the long line behind it.
inventory.empty: No skins in this category yet.

premium.heading: Unlock VIP perks
premium.subtitle: Upgrade your arcade journey with extra rewards, ad-free runs, and premium-only cosmetics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.guestIntro: These preferences stay on this device.
settings.accountIntro: Your supported preferences are saved to your account.
settings.paymentsNote: Payment providers are ready to connect after production configuration.
settings.adsNote: Rewarded ads can plug into the wallet reward service.

terms.title: Terms of use
items: You agree to play fairly and not manipulate score, coins, skins, ads, requests, or game sessions.
Developer tools, request editing, automation, scripts, modified clients, and score tampering are not allowed during gameplay.
The game may pause or block a run when developer tools or suspicious behavior are detected.
Admins may review suspicious activity, remove unfair leaderboard results, ban accounts, unban accounts, and send moderation notices.
Bans include a reason written by an admin. Players who report real security issues can receive public or private thanks.
Purchases, ad rewards, roulette rewards, and coins are validated server-side. Client-only changes are not trusted.
Bots, mass account creation, spam, harassment, insults, threats, offensive support messages, payment abuse, and attempts to bypass restrictions are forbidden.
Support requests must be respectful and honest. Abusive messages can be rejected and may lead to account moderation.

security.devtoolsBody: This run was paused for fair play. Close developer tools and start a new run.

admin.title: Admin control
admin.subtitle: Review players, protect the leaderboard, ban rule breakers, unban accounts, and thank people who help improve the game.
admin.verificationEmailSent: A new verification code was sent by email.
admin.verificationEmailFailed: The email provider did not send the code. Verify manually or configure a verified sending domain.
admin.manualVerifyWarning: Only approve this address when you have confirmed that it belongs to the player. This bypasses the email code.
admin.defaultBanReason: Score manipulation or Terms of use violation.
admin.defaultThanks: Thank you for helping us find and fix a security issue in Waves Arcade.

banReasons.harassment: Harassment, threats, hate speech, or insults.
banReasons.spam: Spam, repeated fake reports, or flooding support.
banReasons.multiAccount: Multiple accounts used to bypass limits or bans.
banReasons.paymentFraud: Payment, ad reward, or shop abuse.
banReasons.devtools: Developer tools or modified client used during gameplay.

support.title: Support
support.passwordWarning: Never send your password. Support and admins do not need it and cannot ask for it.
support.subtitle: Send a message to the admin team about bugs, accounts, shop issues, payments, bans, or anything that needs review.
support.subject: Subject
support.passwordWarning: Never send your password. Support will never ask for your password.
support.guestRulesBody: Use a valid email for replies. Spam, offensive messages, false reports, and repeated abuse can lead to restrictions. Support cannot guarantee restoration of a suspicious score.

rulesPage.title: Game Rules and Terms
rulesPage.heading: Play fair. Keep the arena safe.
rulesPage.intro: These rules apply to guests, account holders, scores, purchases, ads, support, and administrator decisions.
rulesPage.securityBody: Never share your password. Support and administrators will never ask for it.

consent.title: Privacy choices
consent.summary: Necessary storage keeps accounts and game settings working. With your permission, analytics helps us improve the game and advertising helps fund it.
consent.necessaryHelp: Required for login, security and saved preferences.
consent.advertisingHelp: Google Ad Manager banners and rewarded ads.

guest.deviceOnly: Scores and progress stay on this device.
guest.accountRequiredMessage: You need an account to use this feature.
guest.footerLocal: Guest progress is stored only on this device.
guest.transferQuestion: Do you want to save your guest progress to this account?
guest.transferHelp: Only plausible scores and basic settings are transferred. Local coins, premium items, and unverified rewards are ignored.
guest.transferError: Guest progress could not be transferred.

gameExtra.accountForRewards: You need an account to claim rewards.
gameExtra.accountForRewardedItems: You need an account to receive rewarded items.
gameExtra.loginToSave: Log in or create an account to save your score.
gameExtra.scoreRejected: This score was rejected by server validation.
gameExtra.guestGameOver: Create an account to save your score, unlock skins and keep your progress.

restrictions.appealAvailable: You may contact Support to appeal.

settingsDetails.temporaryPasswordWarning: Your temporary password was accepted. You must choose a new password before using other account features.
settingsDetails.guestAccountLimit: Guest has no cloud profile, leaderboard identity, purchases, achievements, or cross-device progress.
settingsDetails.rewardedAdsHelp: Rewarded ads are optional. Guests may see more ads because account features and purchase history are unavailable.
settingsDetails.lastPasswordChange: Last password change: {{date}}. Never share your password.
settingsDetails.passwordHelp: Use at least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number. Do not reuse your current password.
settingsDetails.deleteAccountHelp: This anonymizes your identity, hides scores, removes access, and clears spendable balances. Financial records may be retained in pseudonymous form where legally required.
settingsDetails.deleteConfirmationHelp: Enter your password and type DELETE. This action cannot be undone.

themesPage.title: Themes
themesPage.heading: Build your arena atmosphere
themesPage.subtitle: Themes change the background, trail palette, obstacles, interface accent, and particles.
themesPage.guestNotice: Create an account to unlock more themes. Guests can use the first three basic themes.
themesPage.accountRequired: Create an account to unlock more themes.

aboutPage.title: About Waves Arcade
aboutPage.intro: Waves Arcade is a free browser arcade game built for quick, responsive runs on desktop and mobile. Players guide a glowing line through a changing arena, collect energy and unlock cosmetic customization.
aboutPage.gameplayBody: Guest play starts immediately. An optional account saves valid scores, owned cosmetics, settings and progression across devices.
aboutPage.fairPlayBody: Server-side sessions and score checks protect the leaderboard. Suspicious results are held for review instead of being published automatically.
aboutPage.supportBody: Guests and account players can report bugs, request account help or appeal a restriction. Support never asks for a password.
aboutPage.availability: The game, core guest mode and support are available without a purchase. Cosmetic and rewarded features are optional.

data.title: Data we collect
data.body: Account details, game sessions, valid scores, purchases, support messages, security events and consent choices. Guest identifiers used for analytics are hashed.

purpose.title: Why we use data
purpose.body: To provide accounts and cloud progress, run the game and shop, protect fair play, answer support requests, measure reliability and show advertising only after the required choice.

legal.title: Legal basis
legal.body: Service data is processed to provide the game and enforce its rules. Optional analytics and advertising are based on consent, which can be changed in Settings.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Hosting, database, email, error monitoring, payment and advertising providers receive only the data needed for their role. We do not sell account passwords or authentication tokens.

retention.title: Retention and deletion
retention.body: Security and financial records may be retained where required. Account deletion anonymizes identity, removes access, hides scores and clears spendable balances.

choices.title: Your choices
choices.body: You can change privacy settings, withdraw optional consent, contact Support, appeal moderation and request account deletion from Settings.

security.title: Security
security.body: Passwords are stored as secure hashes. Administrators cannot view old passwords. Never send a password to Support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Use the in-game Support page for privacy requests. Include the account email but never include a password.

necessary.title: Necessary storage
necessary.body: Authentication state, guest session, language, controls, security and consent choices. These are required for core functionality.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: With consent, anonymous events measure sessions, retention, valid scores, ad views and errors. Sensitive fields are filtered server-side.

advertising.title: Advertising
advertising.body: With consent, Google Ad Manager may use cookies or similar storage for banners and rewarded ads according to Google policies and your region.

choices.title: Managing choices
choices.body: Open Cookie preferences in Settings at any time. Rejecting optional storage does not block gameplay, but advertising and analytics integrations remain disabled.

thirdParties.title: Third parties
thirdParties.body: Google, hosting, email and monitoring providers may apply their own storage when their configured feature is used. Their policies also apply.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: The policy may be updated before commercial launch or when providers change. The effective date is shown above.

adminWorkspace.analyticsDescription: Current player, session and monetization activity.
